title: Implement queries in Python
description: Implement queries.py: filter(), sort(), search(). Use index for fast lookups.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added search_issues de-duplication via identifier guard and added coverage to prevent duplicate matches when term is in title and comments. Tests: python -m pytest python/tests/test_queries.py, black python/src/taskulus/queries.py python/tests/test_queries.py, ruff check python/src/taskulus/queries.py python/tests/test_queries.py.
